title: Section 8
content: 1*** Such certificate of registry shall be sealed with the seal of the 2[Government of India], and shall be signed by the person authorised to make such registry.
footnote: 1. The words "And it is hereby enacted, that" rep. by Act 16 of 1874, s. 1 and the Schedule, Pt. I. 2. Subs. by the A. O. 1950, for "East India Company".
